chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5958 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2088/2025. 2. For hearing of CMA No.27934/2024. 3. For hearing of CMA No.26661/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mohamed Vawda, advocate for the respondent 6. Mr. Naveed Ali, advocate for the applicant intervener. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Learned counsel for the respondent 6 points out that instrument impugned has already been recalled, however, insofar elections of the society are concerned, they shall be conducted within three months. In view hereof, petitioner’s counsel states that petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
